forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+depends_on:
+- 01KSQBDM9M4RJJYGQDTZYJA107
+- 01KSQBCTMV4K3ATFZ5RFQ0FJBB
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '8980'
+project: llama-coverage
+title: Cover generation core (mod.rs + generator.rs) via scripted model ŌĆö budget, streaming, chunk accounting
+---
+## What
+
+Drive the generation engine (`crates/llama-agent/src/generation/mod.rs`, `generation/generator.rs`) to near-complete behavioral coverage using the `ScriptedModel` from the harness card. This is where the 0-token bug lived; lock the whole path down.
+
+## Cover, at minimum
+
+- **Budget arithmetic** ŌĆö the exact bug: prompt_len < budget, prompt_len Ōēł budget, prompt_len > budget. Assert the right number of tokens generates in each case; the Ōēł and > cases must NOT yield 0 or underflow.
+- **Both streaming variants** ŌĆö `generate_stream_with_borrowed_model` AND `generate_stream_with_borrowed_model_and_template_offset` (the offset variant currently dead for streaming but must be covered so a re-enable can't regress).
+- **Batch path** ŌĆö `generate_common`, parity with streaming on budget + stop behavior.
+- **Chunk accounting** ŌĆö `StreamChunk.token_count` per-chunk delta; sum across a stream equals the real total (guard against the triangular-number regression).
+- **Context-window guard** ŌĆö `prompt_tokens + generated >= context_size - 1` boundary: exactly at the limit, one under, one over.
+- **token_to_str_lossy** ŌĆö a multi-byte UTF-8 sequence split across two decode steps reassembles correctly (no dropped bytes).
+- **Completion reasons** ŌĆö EOS hit, max_tokens hit, context-window-full ŌĆö each produces the correct completion/finish reason.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- [ ] Every public generation entry point is exercised by at least one scripted-model test.
+- [ ] The three budget regimes (under/Ōēł/over) are each pinned with explicit assertions.
+- [ ] Coverage of `generation/mod.rs` + `generation/generator.rs` rises to the threshold agreed in the gap-map card (target: >95% region coverage, justify any deliberate exclusions).
+- [ ] All new tests use `ScriptedModel` ŌĆö fast, deterministic, no real-model download.
+
+## Tests
+
+- [ ] Add to `crates/llama-agent/tests/integration/` or a `generation/tests.rs` module: budget-regime tests, chunk-accounting test, context-guard boundary tests, lossy-decode split test, completion-reason tests.
+- [ ] Run: `cargo test -p llama-agent generation` and a scoped `cargo llvm-cov --package llama-agent -- generation` to confirm the coverage delta.
+
+## Workflow
+
+- Use `/tdd`. Build on the scripted-model keystone ŌĆö do not reach for a real model for logic paths.
+- Consult the gap map from card `01KSQBCTMV4K3ATFZ5RFQ0FJBB` for the specific uncovered regions.
\ No newline at end of file
